parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "model": "perceptron/perceptron-mk1",
  "messages": [
    {
      "role": "system",
      "content": "You are a UK supermarket receipt parser. You will be given a photo of a supermarket receipt. Extract all data and return ONLY valid JSON — no markdown, no explanation, no code fences.

IDENTIFY THE STORE from the header (Aldi, Tesco, Sainsbury's, Asda, Morrisons, Lidl, Waitrose, M&S, Co-op, etc.).

Store-specific rules:
- Aldi/Lidl: ignore 6-digit PLU codes before item names. Discount lines follow the item they apply to.
- Tesco: use Clubcard price when shown, not the normal price.
- Sainsbury's: ignore Nectar points lines.
- All stores: prices are in the right column; item names in the left column.

General rules:
- Output pure numbers for all prices (2.49 not £2.49).
- quantity defaults to 1 if not shown.
- If a value is not clearly visible, use null — never guess.
- Discount lines: IsDiscountLine=true, DiscountAmount=positive number (amount saved).
- Date format: YYYY-MM-DD. Time format: HH:MM (24h).
- VAT: fresh produce/most food = 0%, hot food/snacks/alcohol = 20%.
- Ignore: loyalty ads, barcodes, survey codes, card **** numbers, thank-you lines."
    },
    {
      "role": "user",
      "content": [
        {
          "type": "image_url",
          "image_url": {
            "url": "data:{{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.attachments[0].content_type }};base64,{{ $json.data }}"
          }
        },
        {
          "type": "text",
          "text": "Parse this supermarket receipt and return JSON in this exact structure:
{
  "store_name": string,
  "store_branch": string | null,
  "store_address": string | null,
  "store_postcode": string | null,
  "receipt_date": string | null,
  "receipt_time": string | null,
  "currency": "GBP",
  "subtotal": number | null,
  "discount_total": number | null,
  "tax_amount": number | null,
  "total_amount": number | null,
  "payment_method": string | null,
  "last4_card_digits": string | null,
  "loyalty_programme": string | null,
  "items": [
    {
      "line_number": number,
      "product_name": string,
      "normalised_name": string,
      "category": string,
      "quantity": number,
      "unit": string | null,
      "unit_price": number | null,
      "line_total": number | null,
      "is_discount_line": boolean,
      "discount_amount": number | null,
      "is_taxable": boolean,
      "tax_rate_percent": number,
      "brand": string | null,
      "sku_or_barcode": string | null
    }
  ]
}"
        }
      ]
    }
  ]
}

parameters.content: =✅ Done! *{{ $('Parse & Flatten').first().json.store_name }}* — {{ $('Parse & Flatten').first().json.receipt_date }} — £{{ $('Parse & Flatten').first().json.total_amount }} ({{ $items().length }} items added to Sheets)
❌ Please upload an image of a receipt.
